scripts.build:chrome: rm -rf dist && vite build --mode production && rm -f dist/manifest.json dist/manifest.firefox.json && cp public/manifest.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.build:firefox: rm -rf dist && vite build --mode production && rm -f dist/manifest.json dist/manifest.firefox.json && cp public/manifest.firefox.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.build:all: rm -rf build && mkdir -p build/chrome build/firefox && pnpm build:chrome && cp -r dist/* build/chrome && pnpm build:firefox && cp -r dist/* build/firefox && cd build/chrome && zip -r ../tomari-chrome-extension.zip . && cd ../firefox && zip -r ../tomari-firefox-extension.zip .
